text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, May 19. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. Great update. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
